title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 26 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 26 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 26 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 26/04/2023
DCE iron ore futures declined by 0.35% today, the main contract closed at 716.5. The traders' willingness to ship is general.The steel mills are not active to purchase. The overall trading sentiment of the market is less.
